description: IBM QRadar v3 (from scratch): a large SIEM content integration with many collection-tuning configuration params (fetch mode, mirroring options, advanced params) and a credentials (type 9) parameter, generated as the 'IBM QRadar' connector. Exercises the from-scratch scaffold over a high-command-count integration with an Automation capability and a Plain (Username & Password) auth profile derived from the QRadar credentials param.
